en: Is that your mom and dad? Mom and dad are going to have to call up kindly Dr. So-and-so.
Dig up your dental records, want to know why? Because there's going to be nothing left to face.
ko: 네 치과 기록을 가져와야 해, 왜냐고?

en: Oh, come on. An expired community college student ID.
What did you study, Raymond? Stuff.
ko: 너는 무엇을 공부했니, 레이먼드? 뭐 그런 거.

en: Where the midterms are? I asked you what you studied.
ko: 너가 무엇을 공부했는지 물었잖아. 주로 생물학.

en: Biology, mostly. Why? I don't know.
What did you want to be, Raymond K. Essel?
ko: 너는 무엇이 되고 싶었니, 레이먼드 K. 헤셀?

en: The question, Raymond, was what did you want to be?
ko: 질문은, 레이먼드, 너는 무엇이 되고 싶었니?

en: Answer him, Raymond K. Essel. Veterinarian. Veterinarian. Animals.
Yeah, animals. Good stuff. Yeah, I got that. That means you have to get more schooling.
ko: 그런 거. 응, 알겠어. 그러면 더 많은 학교를 다녀야 해.

en: Too much school. Would you rather be dead? No.
ko: 너무 많은 학교. 죽는 게 낫겠니? 아니.

en: You'd rather die here, on your knees, in the back of a convenience store?
ko: 여기, 무릎 꿇고, 편의점 뒤에서 죽는 게 낫겠니?
아니, 아니, 아니. 제발, 안 돼.
